anesthesiology.description: Medical specialty dedicated to anesthesia administration and perioperative patient care, including pain management and sedation (e.g., moderate, deep, conscious).

dental.description: Clinical dentistry services focusing on prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of diseases affecting the teeth and oral cavity; may be reported with CDT (Code on Dental Procedures and Nomenclature) or CPT where applicable.

laboratory.description: Laboratory analysis of clinical specimens (blood, urine, tissues, etc.), including molecular and genetic testing where relevant, for the diagnosis and monitoring of disease.

medical_specialties.description: Medicine section services: medical specialties focusing on specialty exams, testing, and non-surgical interventions for specific organ systems or patient populations.

pathology.description: Analysis of tissues, cells, and bodily fluids (microscopically and in the laboratory), including surgical pathology and autopsy when applicable, to diagnose disease.

imaging.description: Radiology procedures and diagnostic imaging (e.g., X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound, nuclear medicine) to visualize internal body structures.

procedures.description: Surgery and other procedural sections: surgical operations and invasive procedures; excludes evaluation and management (E/M).

preventive_medicine.description: Preventive healthcare services including immunizations, screenings, and wellness counseling.
